report.summary: Low-delta cycle: 70 uncommitted files (+1), no new commits, Day 10 without production deploy. All 6 API routes code-stable. 4 new OG images and 10 learn page edits in working tree. Deploy remains singular P0 blocker.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: No new commits since last cycle — HEAD still at 3b2dd28 (Apr 1 build fix)
1,242 page.tsx files on disk (unchanged from prior cycle)
630 published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (unchanged)
2 pages still in PUBLISH_QUEUE: euler-v2-modular-lending, hyperlane-permissionless-interoperability

10 modified learn pages in working tree — content edits to appchains, crypto-index-funds, crypto-passive-income, ethereum-verkle-trees, institutional-adoption, omnichain-defi, solana-token-extensions, stablecoin-payments, unichain guides
stablecoin-yield-tracker page.tsx significantly refactored (563 deletions, net reduction — likely cleanup)
109 published slugs still missing page.tsx (unchanged — long-standing debt, not regression)
No build regressions detected — last commit was a clean build fix

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 core API route files present and unchanged since Mar 12-14: prices (60s TTL), trending (300s), fear-greed (600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (300s)
Cache-Control headers with stale-while-revalidate on all routes — code verified
Fallback coverage unchanged: 2/6 routes have hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA (prices, market-dominance). 4 routes lack graceful fallback — known gap carried forward
No rate limiter changes — src/lib/rate-limiter.ts stable
Live API health check not possible (egress proxy blocks degen0x.com and upstream API domains from sandbox)
CoinGecko free tier still in use — no API key in committed code

sections.title: DevOps
items: P0 BLOCKER: Day 10 without production deploy — last batch deploy was Mar 25 (commit 21aaf5b), last commit was Apr 1 (3b2dd28)
70 uncommitted files in working tree (+1 from last cycle's 69): 16 modified tracked files, 54 untracked files
New untracked assets this cycle: 4 OG SVGs (crypto-watchlist, dao-treasury-dashboard, degen-score, omnichain-defi)
Working tree delta: 346 insertions / 618 deletions across 16 tracked files — net reduction suggests cleanup/refactoring
published-pages.ts has uncommitted changes (+6 lines diff)
Cannot verify live Vercel deployment or error rates from sandbox (egress blocked)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Cycle output: 0 new commits, content edits to 10 learn guides, 1 tool page refactor, 4 new OG images
Today's report cadence: 3 standups, 2 builds, 2 community, 1 prior eod — healthy automation rhythm
Carry-over (persistent): 70 uncommitted files need commit + deploy, 2 publish queue pages need promotion, fallback data coverage at 33%
No new blockers introduced this cycle

Blockers needing Jefe's attention: (1) Production deploy now Day 10 overdue — longest gap in project history, (2) 70-file uncommitted backlog continues growing, (3) Fallback data gap on 4/6 API routes is ongoing risk
